file.description: Filesystem path on the node where the pprof block-contention profile will be written. Existing files are overwritten.

nsec.description: Sampling duration in seconds. Profiling runs for this long, then the buffer is flushed to `file`.

file.description: Filesystem path on the node where the pprof CPU profile will be written. Existing files are overwritten.

nsec.description: Profiling duration in seconds. CPU sampling runs for this long before the file is written.

file.description: Filesystem path on the node where the Go execution trace will be written (consume with `go tool trace`).
Filesystem path on the node where the pprof mutex-contention profile will be written.
Filesystem path where the current block-contention profile snapshot will be written.
Filesystem path where the current heap profile snapshot will be written.
Filesystem path where the current mutex profile snapshot will be written.
Filesystem path that CPU profile samples will stream to until `debug_stopCPUProfile` is called.
Filesystem path that Go execution trace events will stream to until `debug_stopGoTrace` is called.

rate.description: Block-profile sampling rate. 0 disables profiling; 1 samples every blocking event; higher values sample 1-in-N.
Mutex-profile sampling fraction. 0 disables; N samples 1-in-N contention events.

v.description: New `GOGC` value as a percentage. Returns the previous setting. Negative values disable GC.

number.description: Block height to fetch. Returns the RLP-encoded bytes of that block.
Block height to fetch. Returns the RLP-encoded bytes of that header.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block height tag (hex or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) or block hash to fetch as raw RLP.

number.description: Block height to dump. Returns a human-readable representation of the block.

hash.description: Hash of the block to re-execute. The endpoint returns the intermediate state roots after each transaction.

config.description: Optional tracer configuration (tracer name, timeout, reexec depth, state overrides). Pass null for defaults.

tblockRlp.description: RLP-encoded block bytes to trace. The block is executed against the parent state without committing.

config.description: Optional tracer configuration. Pass null for the default `callTracer`.

hash.description: Hash of the canonical block to re-execute and trace.

config.description: Optional tracer configuration. Pass null for the default `callTracer`.

height.description: Block height tag (hex integer or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) of the block to trace.

config.description: Optional tracer configuration. Pass null for the default `callTracer`.

args.description: Transaction call object (from, to, gas, gasPrice, value, data, etc.) describing the call to simulate and trace.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose post-state should be used as the starting point for the simulated call.

config.description: Optional tracer configuration including state overrides. Pass null for defaults.

hash.description: Hash of an already-mined transaction to re-execute and trace.

config.description: Optional tracer configuration. Pass null for the default `callTracer`.

args.description: Call object describing the message (from, to, gas, gasPrice/maxFeePerGas, value, data, etc.). Executed as `eth_call` without modifying state.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash supplying the state context for the call.

args.description: Call object whose execution is simulated to determine the optimal EIP-2930 access list.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash supplying the state context for the simulation.

args.description: Call object to estimate. Optional `from`, `to`, `value`, `data`, `gas`, `gasPrice`. The node finds the minimum gas that makes the call succeed.

blockNrOptional.description: Optional block tag for the state context. Defaults to `pending` when omitted.

blockCount.description: Number of historical blocks to include (1–1024). Encoded as a hex or decimal string.

lastBlock.description: Highest block of the requested range — hex height or tag (`latest`, `pending`, etc.).

rewardPercentiles.description: Optional priority-fee percentiles (0–100, monotonically increasing). For each block, the node returns the effective priority fee at each percentile.

args.description: Partial transaction object. Missing fields (nonce, gas, gas price/cap) are filled in by the node using current chain state.

address.description: 20-byte Ethereum address whose native-token balance is queried.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose post-state balance should be returned.

hash.description: Hash of the block to fetch.

fullTx.description: If true, the response includes full transaction objects; if false, only the transaction hashes.

ethBlockNum.description: Block tag (hex height or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) identifying the block to fetch.

fullTx.description: If true, the response includes full transaction objects; if false, only the transaction hashes.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose transaction receipts should be returned.

hash.description: Hash of the block whose transaction count is requested.

blockNum.description: Block tag (hex height or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) whose transaction count is requested.

address.description: 20-byte address whose deployed bytecode is requested.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose post-state should be queried.

id.description: Filter ID previously returned by `eth_newFilter`, `eth_newBlockFilter`, or `eth_newPendingTransactionFilter`.
Filter ID previously returned by `eth_newFilter`. Returns all logs matching the filter since its creation.

hash.description: Hash of the block whose header is requested.

ethBlockNum.description: Block tag (hex height or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) identifying the header to fetch.

crit.description: Filter criteria: `fromBlock`/`toBlock` range or `blockHash`, optional `address`(es), and optional `topics`. Returns all matching logs.

address.description: Account address for which to produce a Merkle-Patricia proof.

storageKeys.description: Storage slots (32-byte hex strings) to additionally include in the proof.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose state root the proof is rooted at.

address.description: Account address whose storage is queried.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose post-state should be queried.

idx.description: Zero-based transaction index within the block (hex).

blockNum.description: Block tag (hex height or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) containing the transaction.

idx.description: Zero-based transaction index within the block (hex).

address.description: Address whose nonce (number of transactions sent) is requested.

blockNrOrHash.description: Block tag or block hash whose post-state nonce should be returned.

txHash.description: Transaction hash whose emitted logs are requested.

hash.description: Transaction hash whose receipt (status, gas used, logs, contract address) is requested.

blockHash.description: Block hash whose uncle is requested. Note: post-merge Ethereum has no uncles; the response is null on Lumera.

index.description: Zero-based uncle index within the block (hex).

blockNumber.description: Block height (hex) whose uncle is requested. Note: post-merge Ethereum has no uncles; the response is null on Lumera.

index.description: Zero-based uncle index within the block (hex).

blockHash.description: Block hash whose uncle count is requested. Always 0 on Lumera (no uncles).

blockNumber.description: Block height tag whose uncle count is requested. Always 0 on Lumera (no uncles).

criteria.description: Filter criteria: `fromBlock`/`toBlock`, optional `address`(es), optional `topics`. Returns a filter ID poll-able via `eth_getFilterChanges`.

args.description: Original transaction object identified by its `from` and `nonce`. The pending transaction is replaced with this content.

gasPrice.description: New gas price (or `maxFeePerGas`) for the replacement transaction. Typically must be higher than the original to be accepted.

gasLimit.description: Optional new gas limit. Pass null to keep the original.

data.description: Signed, RLP-encoded transaction bytes (`0x`-prefixed hex). Returns the transaction hash on successful submission.

args.description: Transaction object to sign with one of the node's unlocked accounts and submit. Requires `personal_unlockAccount` first.

address.description: Address (must be unlocked on the node) whose key signs the data using the Ethereum signed-message prefix.

data.description: Arbitrary bytes to sign. The node prepends `\x19Ethereum Signed Message:\n<len>` before hashing.

address.description: Address (must be unlocked on the node) whose key signs the EIP-712 typed data.

id.description: Filter ID to remove. Returns true if the filter was found and removed.

etherbase.description: Address that should receive block rewards / coinbase output for this node.

extra.description: Extra-data string included in mined block headers (max 32 bytes).

gasLimit.description: Target gas limit for blocks produced by this node (hex).

gasPrice.description: Minimum gas price (hex) for transactions accepted into this node's mempool/built blocks.

threads.description: Optional number of mining threads to start. Pass null/omit to use the node default.

data.description: Original data that was signed via `personal_sign` (Ethereum signed-message prefix is reapplied during recovery).

privkey.description: 32-byte secp256k1 private key as hex (no `0x` prefix). Imported into the node's keystore.

password.description: Passphrase used to encrypt the imported key in the keystore.

url.description: Hardware-wallet URL (e.g. `ledger://...`) identifying the device to initialize.

address.description: Address whose previously unlocked key should be re-encrypted and locked.

password.description: Passphrase used to encrypt the newly generated keystore entry.

args.description: Transaction object to sign and submit using a temporarily-unlocked keystore account.

password.description: Passphrase of the sender's keystore account; used to unlock just for this call.

data.description: Arbitrary bytes to sign with the Ethereum signed-message prefix.

addr.description: Address whose keystore key signs the data (unlocked just for this call).
Address to unlock for subsequent `eth_sendTransaction` calls.

duration.description: Optional unlock duration in seconds (default 300, 0 means unlock until process exit). Pass null for the default.

url.description: Hardware-wallet URL identifying the device to unpair.

address.description: Address whose pending and queued transactions should be returned from this node's mempool view.

input.description: Hex-encoded bytes to Keccak-256 hash. Returns the 32-byte digest as hex.
